positive: A mesmerizing celestial biome featuring stylized, geometric constellations and bioluminescent flora, arranged in a perfectly symmetrical central medallion composition. The primary motifs include stylized crescent moons, blooming fractal flowers, and abstract zodiac symbols, rendered with thick, clean outlines. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, electric cyan, metallic gold, and muted emerald green, utilizing high contrast for maximum print pop. The style is a blend of Art Deco linework and mystical psychedelia, giving it a luxurious, retro-futuristic poster quality. The background should be clean, solid negative space to emphasize the central artwork, ensuring the design translates flawlessly onto fabric. Highly detailed, symmetrical, vector-graphic quality.
negative: low resolution, blurry, bokeh, messy, grunge, photorealistic, abstract art, signature, text, logo, watermark, asymmetrical, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, amateur, gradients, noise
